description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a thin, dark bezel framing the screen. The front view reveals a high-resolution display showing a digital clock and a dramatic landscape image, suggesting it is powered on. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand with a central column, providing stability and a minimalistic aesthetic. The rear and side views show a slim profile, with the back panel being plain and unadorned, and no visible buttons or ports. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or home environments. The materials appear to be primarily matte black plastic with a glass or acrylic screen surface.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a thin bezel and a sturdy rectangular pedestal stand, featuring a high-resolution display and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's slim profile and the central support column attached to a rectangular base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide screen with thin bezel, digital clock interface, and landscape image, highlighting the monitor's active display area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the slim profile and central support, with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the rectangular base, with no visible branding or ports.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and has a minimalistic appearance with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a central vertical support column, made of matte black plastic or metal, with a flat, wide base for stability.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or base of the monitor.
